rights.title: Right to a written contract
rights.description: Your employer must provide the essential terms of your employment in writing within one month of starting work.

rights.title: Right to holiday pay
rights.description: You are entitled to at least 8% of your gross annual salary as holiday allowance, paid at least once per year.

rights.title: Right to refuse unsafe work
rights.description: Under Dutch law you can refuse work that endangers your health or safety, without retaliation.
